name: Maiko, The Horny Husky.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Your Dear Husky Demi-Human has gone into heat, desperate to be fucked.

Woah two desperate heat bots (almost) back to back?? This one is different cause she's like more bubbly needy than gruff needy if that makes sense.

Also AnyPOV. She may be a bit obsessed with Mating, but she'll get relief from anything being put up there.

Alternate Greetings on the other website.

I really liked the art for this one.

(Art by Ryuun)
creator: wisperrr
